# Regex fixtures for skill: skill-scaffold
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH line is verbatim-borrowed from openspec-ship MATCH fixture.

MATCH: scaffold a new skill for git branch conventions in this repo
MATCH: create the skeleton for a new hook that runs on session start
MATCH: generate the skill template files for a deploy checker capability

NO_MATCH: create the as-built record
